title: Structure Compass
description: Adds a compass for each structure that you can use to locate structures
body:
This mod adds a compass that can be used to locate structures of choice.
When you craft the Structure Compass it's not set to any particular structure. You'll have to Sneak Right-click to set the structure you want to locate.
After which you Right-click the Structure Compass normally to start searching.
It will try to locate a structure within 300 blocks by default, this can be changed in the config.
When the compass can't find the structure it will point to world spawn.

In 1.15 and older the mod had added a Compass per vanilla structure.
